question: At what place in Kashmir is the Habba Khatoon peak situated?
search_snippets: About Habba Khatoon Peak Habba Khatoon Peak is one of the most popular pyramid-shaped mountains, standing at an elevation of 4,380 meters (13,370 feet) in the Gurez Valley of Jammu and Kashmir. It is a well known spot among trekkers and nature lovers who visit the valley for its stunning landscapes and offbeat charm. | Things to Do at Habba Khatoon Peak, Gurez Valley: A Complete Tourism Guide Habba Khatoon Peak stands like a limestone pyramid on the banks of the Kishanganga River in Gurez Valley
